Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add comprehensive Software Requirements Specification

- Added sections 7-12: Database Schema, Testing, Backup, API, Monitoring, Privacy
- Expanded functional requirements with detailed booking system specs
- Added 8 detailed use cases with flows and postconditions
- Added accessibility requirements \(WCAG 2.1 Level AA\)
- Fixed technology version inconsistencies \(Laravel 11.x, PHP 8.2+\)
- Enhanced deployment requirements with server specs and hosting options
- Improved GitHub Actions workflow with detailed CI/CD steps
- Added comprehensive database schema with all tables, columns, and relationships

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
